Mining Integration Summit 2026

South African Mining Committees Association

20 – 22 July 2026 · Sun City Resort

Register your interest for the Mining Integration Summit 2026

Sun City Resort, North West Province

Be among the first to receive event updates and secure your place at Africa's premier mining integration platform — dedicated to ethical leadership, industrial innovation, and inclusive growth.

By registering, you will:

  • Gain early access to delegate registration and priority seating
  • Receive timely updates on speakers, themes, and the official programme
  • Stay informed on partnership announcements and networking opportunities
  • Be part of the community advancing African mining and investment

Gold Full Access

Subject to SAMCA membership verification.

This is an information-only sign-up to keep you in the loop via email with relevant event news. Join thousands of professionals from across the mining value chain and stay ahead of the conversation shaping the future of African mining.
